name: zpl-engine-mcp
description: v3.3.1: 67 tools (63 unique + 4 aliases). 8 new AI Eval tools for model behavioral consistency testing (sycophancy, refusal balance, language equity, persona drift, safety boundary, hallucination detection, emotional stability). Mathematical stability engine for measuring balance and bias in finance, gaming, AI/ML, security, and crypto data. AIN is a STABILITY measurement only — never prediction or advice.
